name: Greek Spinach Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch quiche dish with pie crust.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Bake the crust for 3 minutes.
3. Remove from oven and prick the bottom of the crust with a fork.
4. Return the crust to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Cook spinach according to package directions; drain well.
6. In a mixing bowl, combine cooked spinach, milk, Feta cheese, eggs, melted butter, Romano cheese, flour, pepper, salt, and nutmeg.
7. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 35 minutes or until set.
9. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
